must_detect.matched_text:
NON-PUBLIC — Project Ivy retention & transfer note; EU MAR Art.17 delay justification; Embargo until 2026-09-30 07:00 CET.
Issuer: Orion Linens SE (Helios Exchange HEU: ORNX); Board memo approved by Dr. Elara Voss, Chair; contact privacy@orionlinens.eu, tel:+352-000-0214.
DPA Addendum with CloudLoom B.V. (Processor) signed 2026-06-05; definitive Share Purchase Agreement for 12.5% of Looma Threads AG at EUR 245,000,000; Long Stop Date 2026-10-31.
MAC/MAE clause (negated): no ma terial ad verse ch ange shall be deemed to have occurred due to general market conditions, currency movements, or pandemics.
GDPR Art 9 notice: limited processing of employee health certifications for transaction fit-to-work checks based on explicit consent; records of processing and DPIA completed.
Cross-border transfers: EEA → UK and US subprocessors under 2021 SCCs (Module 2, C2P) + UK Addendum; TIAs logged; data at rest AES-256 and in transit TLS1.3; crypto keys held in EU HSM.
Retention: diligence PII retained 6 years from Closing or termination; CSRD/SFDR KPIs (Scope 1–3 and taxonomy %) retained 10 years for audit and assurance under internal policy ORL-R-12.
MAR workflow: insider list (PRJ-IVY-INS) hosted in the HEU issuer portal; wall-crossed investors bound by NDAs; delay notification pre-cleared with Luma Capital Markets Authority (LCMA).
Access control: least privilege; data room URL h t t p s : //files.orionlinens.eu/d?docId=PRJ-IVY-DA-2026&sec=nonpublic&sig=9f3a-12xx; Checklist ID: CL-07 flags redaction of indirect identifiers.
Public-source note: per Orion Linens’ 2024 sustainability brochure already published, Scope 2 targets move to 100% renewable by 2030 and are not price-sensitive.
DSAR workflow: email dsar@orionlinens.eu or write to Orion Linens SE, 3 Rue Imaginaire, L-1000 Nova, Grand Duchy of Luma; response within 30 days subject to Art 12(3) extensions.
Security incident notice: Processor must notify Controller within 24h of becoming aware; breach log maintained; to date there has been no breach and no embargo leak.
project mgmt: upload board pack to vdr; scrub pii before sharing drafts with CloudLoom; schedule dry-run; do not print; archive old v1.2 notes.
HR perk (not transaction-related): team spa-day gift cards to be sent Q3; this line is benign and unrelated to the SPA.
